catalog_name: Nexus Golden Truth Source Slice Catalog
authority_note: Generated broker-facing catalog of source slices in Golden Truth Markdown. Source slices are retrievable context units, not new source authority.
slice_policy: Explicit source-slice markers keep their curated IDs. Every otherwise-unmarked level-two heading receives a deterministic generated ID, and meaningful document preambles receive a document-context slice.
generated_id_note: Generated IDs remain stable while the owning doc_id and heading remain stable. Add an explicit source-slice marker before using a generated ID in a durable runtime contract.
marker_format: <!-- source-slice: domain.topic.slice-id --> followed immediately by the indexed Markdown heading
